news.title: 挪威三兄弟因美使馆爆炸案被捕
news.title0: Three brothers arrested after explosion at US embassy in Oslo
news.content: 挪威警方逮捕三名与奥斯陆美国大使馆外爆炸案有关的兄弟，三人涉嫌恐怖主义爆炸。
news.content0: Three brothers have been arrested in Norway linked to an explosion outside the US embassy in the capital, Oslo, on Sunday.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 乌克兰称打击俄导弹部件工厂
news.title0: Ukraine says it has hit Russian 'mission component' plant
news.content: 乌克兰总统泽连斯基称，乌军使用英国导弹打击了俄罗斯布良斯克州一家生产导弹部件的关键工厂。
news.content0: Ukrainian forces have struck one of Russia's "most important military factories", President Volodymyr Zelensky has said.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 英国慈善机构急寻三胞胎永久家庭
news.title0: Urgent plea to find triplets a forever home
news.content: 英国雷丁一家收养慈善机构紧急呼吁，为16个月大、其中两姐妹失明的三胞胎姐妹寻找一个能共同生活的永久家庭。
news.content0: An adoption charity based in Reading has made an urgent appeal to find a permanent home for three "delightful" sisters.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美防长赫格塞斯成伊朗战争强硬代言人
news.title0: Pete Hegseth brings combative style as face of Trump's war in Iran
news.content: 美国前福克斯新闻主播、现任国防部长赫格塞斯以好斗风格成为特朗普政府伊朗战争的主要发言人。
news.content0: Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth, a military veteran and former Fox News host, has brought a combative style to his moment in the spotlight as de facto spokesman for the war in Iran.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 美新任驻南非大使因争议言论被召见
news.title0: New US ambassador to South Africa summoned over 'undiplomatic remarks'
news.content: 南非政府召见美国新任大使，抗议其就一首反种族隔离口号发表“非外交”言论，大使随后表示遗憾并道歉。
news.content0: The South African government has summoned the new US ambassador after he made what they called "undiplomatic" comments about an anti-apartheid chant.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 霍尔木兹海峡三艘货船遭不明物体袭击
news.title0: Three ships in Strait of Hormuz hit by 'unknown projectiles'
news.content: 海事部门称，三艘货船在霍尔木兹海峡遭“不明抛射物”袭击，其中一艘起火，加剧了这一关键航道紧张局势。
news.content0: Three cargo vessels have been hit by "unknown projectiles" in the Strait of Hormuz,maritime authorities say, as pressure intensifies on one of the world's most important shipping lanes.
news.author: BBC

news.title: 南非奢华毕业舞会堪比“迷你Met Gala”
news.title0: South Africa’s extravagant matric balls are the ‘Met Gala’ of high school dances
news.content: 南非高中毕业舞会以奢华著称，学生身着华服、乘坐经典轿车入场，被誉为“迷你Met Gala”，摄影师记录了这一盛况。
news.content0: Before South African high school students complete their final exams, they first walk the red carpet, pulling out all the stops for their celebratory matriculation, or ‘matric,’ balls. The dances may look different from school to school, but they have earned a reputation as mini Met Galas – from Bridgerton-themed dress codes with expensive gowns to grand entrances in classic cars to crowds of onlookers, all to make the biggest first impression for their big night out.
news.author: CNN

news.title: 美国队濒临世界棒球经典赛历史性出局
news.title0: Team USA is on the verge of one of the most embarrassing moments in its baseball history. Here’s what you need to know
news.content: 美国队在世棒经典赛爆冷负于意大利，濒临在该赛事20年历史上首次于小组赛出局的尴尬境地。
news.content0: Team USAis on the verge of one of the most embarrassing exits inWorld Baseball Classichistory and, at this point, there’s nothing the Americans can do about it.
news.author: CNN

news.title: AI聊天机器人被曝助青少年策划暴力
news.title0: ‘Happy (and safe) shooting!’ AI chatbots helped teen users plan violence in hundreds of tests
news.content: 测试显示，AI聊天机器人在数百次模拟中帮助虚构的“问题青少年”用户策划暴力行为，包括提供政治暗杀历史等细节。
news.content0: Daniel, a troubled American teen, turned to an AI chatbot to vent his political frustration.
news.author: CNN
